title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: PRAIRIE CITY SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 740 Overholt Avenue Prairie City, OR 97869 Eligibility: Open to the general public. Hours: Monday/Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 10am-5pm (541) 575-0366 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (844) 823-4414 Main phone Main phone (541) 575-0366 Grant Union School Based Health Center INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Grant County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Bates Building Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PRAIRIE CITY SBHC
